userStories.title: Set up project structure and initialize Python environment with uv
userStories.description: Create the project directory structure and initialize a Python project using uv package manager with all necessary dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Project directory structure created: backtest/, bots/, shared/, data/raw/, data/processed/, notebooks/, tests/
pyproject.toml created with uv init
Core dependencies installed: pandas, numpy, vectorbt, backtesting, yfinance, ta, matplotlib, plotly
Dev dependencies installed: pytest, pytest-cov, black, ruff, mypy
Python version set to 3.11+
uv.lock file generated

userStories.title: Implement base strategy class and Open Gate strategy
userStories.description: Create the abstract base strategy class and implement the Open Gate strategy from ALGO.md with gate detection, breakout detection, and confirmation logic.
acceptanceCriteria: backtest/strategies/base.py created with abstract BaseStrategy class
BaseStrategy defines __init__, on_data, reset, get_state, set_state abstract methods
backtest/strategies/open_gate.py created with OpenGateStrategy class
OpenGateStrategy implements gate detection for first 5-minute candle
OpenGateStrategy implements breakout detection (broke_above/broke_below)
OpenGateStrategy implements retest detection with support for bullish/bearish
OpenGateStrategy implements confirmation logic (wick rejection, bullish/bearish engulfing)
OpenGateStrategy calculates stop loss and take profit correctly

userStories.title: Build backtesting framework with vectorbt
userStories.description: Create a backtesting framework using vectorbt to test strategies with historical data, calculate metrics, and run optimizations.
acceptanceCriteria: backtest/backtest.py created with BacktestRunner class
BacktestRunner can load historical 1-minute data from CSV or parquet
BacktestRunner can run OpenGateStrategy on historical data
BacktestRunner generates entries and exits based on strategy signals
BacktestRunner calculates performance metrics: Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate, profit factor
backtest/optimize.py created with parameter optimization using grid search
backtest/report.py created to generate performance reports
BacktestRunner supports walk-forward analysis
BacktestRunner supports Monte Carlo simulation

userStories.title: Implement data fetcher for yfinance and Polygon.io
userStories.description: Create a data fetcher that can retrieve historical and real-time market data from yfinance and Polygon.io.
acceptanceCriteria: backtest/data/fetcher.py created with BaseDataFetcher abstract class
BaseDataFetcher defines fetch_historical, fetch_live_tick, fetch_live_bars, normalize abstract methods
backtest/data/yfinance_fetcher.py created with YFinanceFetcher implementation
YFinanceFetcher can fetch 1-minute bars for futures (NQ=F, ES=F)
backtest/data/polygon_fetcher.py created with PolygonFetcher implementation
PolygonFetcher can fetch tick-level and minute data from Polygon.io
Fetcher supports fallback chain (primary → fallback1 → fallback2)

userStories.title: Create shared core library with risk manager, execution handler, and state store
userStories.description: Implement the shared core library with risk management, order execution, and state persistence for bot deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: shared/core/risk_manager.py created with RiskManager class
RiskManager enforces daily loss limits (USD and percentage)
RiskManager enforces max drawdown limits
RiskManager enforces max trades per day
RiskManager tracks consecutive losses for circuit breaker
shared/core/execution.py created with abstract ExecutionHandler class
ExecutionHandler defines connect, submit_order, cancel_order, get_open_orders, get_account_balance, get_positions methods
shared/core/state.py created with StateStore class using SQLite
StateStore persists bot state, positions, and trade history
shared/core/orchestrator.py created with BotOrchestrator class
BotOrchestrator manages multiple bot processes
BotOrchestrator implements global risk monitor with emergency stop

userStories.title: Build first trading bot (nq-open-gate-001) with config and main entry point
userStories.description: Create the first trading bot instance with configuration, bot-specific state, and main entry point.
acceptanceCriteria: bots/nq-open-gate-001/bot.json created with full configuration
Bot config includes: bot_id, strategy type, ticker, timeframe, market session, funds allocation, risk limits, parameters
bots/nq-open-gate-001/main.py created as thin wrapper entry point
Main.py loads config, initializes strategy, risk manager, execution handler, and state store
Bots/nq-open-gate-001/state/ directory created for bot-specific state
Main.py implements market hours check and trading loop
Main.py integrates with risk manager for pre-trade checks
Main.py submits orders to execution handler
Main.py handles errors and implements restart logic

userStories.title: Create monitoring dashboard and alerting system
userStories.description: Build a lightweight monitoring dashboard and alert system for bot status, P&L, and risk metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: shared/core/metrics.py created with MetricsCollector class
MetricsCollector tracks: total_return, daily_return, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, win_rate, profit_factor, trade count
shared/core/alerts.py created with AlertManager class
AlertManager defines severity levels: info, warning, critical
AlertManager sends notifications via webhook (Discord/Slack)
dashboard/ directory created with Streamlit app structure
Dashboard shows: bot status, P&L summary, risk metrics, trade log, alerts
Dashboard supports real-time updates via WebSocket or polling

userStories.title: Write unit tests and integration tests
userStories.description: Create comprehensive tests for strategy, backtesting, risk management, and execution components.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/__init__.py created
tests/test_strategy.py created with OpenGateStrategy unit tests
Test for gate detection on sample data
Test for breakout detection
Test for retest detection
Test for confirmation logic (wick rejection, engulfing)
tests/test_risk_manager.py created with RiskManager tests
Test for daily loss limit enforcement
Test for max drawdown limit enforcement
tests/test_execution.py created with ExecutionHandler mocks
Test for order submission and position management
All tests pass with pytest --cov=.
Tests run in under 30 seconds

userStories.title: Run backtests on Open Gate strategy and validate performance metrics
userStories.description: Run backtests on the Open Gate strategy with at least 2 years of historical data and verify metrics meet deployment thresholds.
acceptanceCriteria: Backtest runs on NQ=F or ES=F with 1-minute data for 2+ years
Backtest uses yfinance (no API key required) or sample data
Sharpe ratio > 1.0 achieved
Max drawdown < 15%
Win rate > 45%
Profit factor > 1.3
Walk-forward analysis completed with train/test split
Monte Carlo simulation performed (1000+ iterations)
Parameter sensitivity analysis completed
Out-of-sample validation on last 6 months of data
Performance report generated in reports/ directory
Backtesting framework can load and process historical data
Backtesting framework can generate entry/exit signals
Backtesting framework can calculate metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, win rate, profit factor)

userStories.title: Create deployment configuration and scripts
userStories.description: Create Docker configuration, orchestrator setup, and operational scripts for bot deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile.bot created for bot containerization
docker-compose.yml created for multi-bot orchestration
scripts/bot_status.py created to check bot health
scripts/pnl_report.py created for P&L reporting
scripts/emergency_stop.py created to kill all bots or specific bot
scripts/reset_daily_stats.py created for daily reset
scripts/create_bot.py created for new bot scaffolding
.env.example created with API key placeholders
README.md updated with setup and deployment instructions

userStories.title: Swap custom BacktestRunner for backtesting.py
userStories.description: Replace backtest/backtest.py custom BacktestRunner with backtesting.py library integration. Create a Strategy adapter that works with backtesting.py.
acceptanceCriteria: backtest/backtesting_runner.py created with BacktestingPyAdapter class
OpenGateStrategy adapter compatible with backtesting.py Strategy class
backtest/backtest.py updated to use backtesting.Backtest
backtest.optimize.py updated to use backtesting.Backtest.optimize
backtest/report.py uses backtesting.lib.plot for interactive charts
Existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Wire vectorbt into the optimizer
userStories.description: Integrate vectorbt for fast parameter sweeps alongside backtesting.py for detailed backtests.
acceptanceCriteria: backtest/optimize.py includes vectorbt.SMA.run_combs for bulk sweeps
backtest/optimize.py has Portfolio.from_signals for signal-based backtest
Optimizer supports both mode: detailed (backtesting.py) + fast (vectorbt)
Grid search with vectorbt can test 1000+ combos in seconds

userStories.title: Integrate varlock for secure .env management
userStories.description: Wire varlock into the project for secure secret resolution from 1Password via .env.schema.
acceptanceCriteria: .env.schema exists with 1Password op:// refs for POLYGON_API_KEY, ALPACA_KEY_ID, ALPACA_SECRET_KEY, IBKR_ACCOUNT, IBKR_PASSWORD
Scripts use varlock run instead of plain env vars
Bot main.py uses varlock run for secrets
Dockerfile updated to include varlock
Documentation in README for varlock setup
